name: Layer Mix TOP
description: The Layer Mix TOP lets you composite unlimited image layers and do adjustments, all within one node. Each of the inputs gets a block of parameters that you can use to modify the incoming images. The possible built-in controls per-layer include crop, pre-fit, justify, extend, scale, rotate, translate, pivot and then layer transparency, gamma and level, and finally the composite (blend) operation. To avoid clutter, on the first page you choose which controls you want to be per-layer. The entire mixing of layers is done with one single-pass shader that is generated on-the-fly. You can composite back to front, or front-to-back. You can specify a large background plate (image or constant) to composite your layers over. The background plate can be a constant-colored image with the resolution of the first input, or defined as a width-height on the Common page, or a separate TOP image. The inputs can be a mix of wired inputs and references to TOPs using pattern matching of names.

parameters.name: Background
parameters.label: Background
parameters.description: This menu determines which background plate to use while compositing.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.label: Size
parameters.description: This menu determines the resolution of the output image. This parameter does not affect what gets composited, regardless of which menu item is selected. It only controls the output resolution.

parameters.name: Background TOP
parameters.label: Background TOP
parameters.description: The path of the Background TOP being referenced. The Background and Size parameters will share the same TOP if the Background TOP menu item is selected for both menus.

parameters.name: Background Color
parameters.label: Background Color
parameters.description: Sets the red, green, blue, and alpha color channels if the Constant Layer menu item is selected for the Background parameter.

parameters.name: Enable Crop
parameters.label: Enable Crop
parameters.description: Adds crop (left, right, bottom, top) parameters to each layer. If disabled, each layer will have default UV bounds of (0, 1, 0, 1).

parameters.name: Crop Unit
parameters.label: Crop Unit
parameters.description: Sets the units used by the Crop parameter for each layer.

parameters.name: Pre-Fit Layer
parameters.label: Pre-Fit Layer
parameters.description: Determines how each layer fills the composite.

parameters.name: Enable Justify
parameters.label: Enable Justify
parameters.description: Adds justify parameters to each layer. If disabled, each layer will default to center horizontal and center vertical alignment.

parameters.name: Extend
parameters.label: Extend
parameters.description: Sets the extend (or repeat) conditions of the layers. This parameter determines what happens at the edges of the layers.

parameters.name: Scale
parameters.label: Scale
parameters.description: Adds scale parameters to the layers.

parameters.name: Enable Rotate
parameters.label: Enable Rotate
parameters.description: Adds rotation parameters to each layer. If disabled, each layer will have default rotation of 0.

parameters.name: Enable Translate
parameters.label: Enable Translate
parameters.description: Adds translation parameters to each layer. If disabled, each layer will have default translation of 0.

parameters.name: Enable Pivot
parameters.label: Enable Pivot
parameters.description: Adds pivot parameters to each layer. If disabled, each layer will default the pivot to the center of the layer.

parameters.name: Translate / Pivot Unit
parameters.label: Translate / Pivot Unit
parameters.description: Sets the units used by the Translate and Pivot parameters for each layer.

parameters.name: Enable Opacity
parameters.label: Enable Opacity
parameters.description: Adds opacity parameters to each layer. If disabled, each layer will have default opacity of 1. Setting a layer's opacity to 0 can be used to optimize the Layer Mix TOP to stop wired input nodes from cooking if it isn't being displayed.

parameters.name: Enable Brightness
parameters.label: Enable Brightness
parameters.description: Adds brightness parameters to each layer. If disabled, each layer will have default brightness of 1.

parameters.name: Enable Levels
parameters.label: Enable Levels
parameters.description: Adds black level and gamma parameters to each layer, using Luma Level TOP's algorithm. If disabled, each layer will have default black level of 0 and gamma of 1.

parameters.name: Operation / Swap
parameters.label: Operation / Swap
parameters.description: Sets the composite (blend) operation and swap order for the layers.

parameters.name: Composite Order
parameters.label: Composite Order
parameters.description: Sets the compositing order of the layers. Front to Back means the first input will be layered at the top of the compositing stack. Back to Front means the first input will be layered at the bottom of the compositing stack. [[image:LayerMixTOP Composite Order.png|450px]]

parameters.name: Layer
parameters.label: Layer
parameters.description: Sequence of layers.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the live Layer_Mix_TOP wiki page
